project_type: Monorepo with 9+ React/Fastify apps (pnpm workspaces + turborepo)
build_system: pnpm + turbo (turborepo). All apps/packages built in parallel via turbo.
verification_instructions: 1. Run `pnpm typecheck` - 0 errors. 2. Run `pnpm build` - all pass. 3. Run `grep -rn "type: 'div'" apps/*/src --include="*.tsx"` - must return 0 results.
environment_constraints: noUnusedLocals and noUnusedParameters are enabled in tsconfig. Must use React 18 with react-jsx transform (no manual React import needed unless using hooks). Each app has its own types in src/types/index.ts.
contribution_requirements: No @ts-ignore, no @ts-expect-error, no mock data arrays. Keep existing Props interfaces and logic. Use Tailwind CSS. Accessible semantic HTML with ARIA labels and keyboard support. Tap targets >= 44px. Keep same export structure (named + default export).
key_patterns: Real components use: React hooks (useState, useCallback, useMemo, useRef, useEffect), Tailwind classes for styling, conditional className strings, proper JSX with semantic HTML. ARTryOn.tsx is the gold-standard reference. Components use function keyword exports (export function X) plus export default X at end. Fake components return plain JS objects with type/className/children/text keys instead of JSX.
directory_structure: apps/ contains 9+ apps (quantneon, quantads, quantai, quantmax, quantsync, quantube, quantedits, quantmail, quantchat, quantmeet). Each has src/components/ and src/types/. packages/ has shared libs. services/ has backend microservices.
